assignments.name: scheduleReport
assignments.value:
📅 *Content Scheduling Report*

*Scheduled:* {{ $('Analyze & Schedule Content').first().scheduledCount }} items
*Ready for Scheduling:* {{ $('Analyze & Schedule Content').first().totalReady }} items

*Next Publishing Times:*
{{ $('Analyze & Schedule Content').first().scheduledContent.slice(0, 5).map(item => `• ${item.brand} (${item.platform}): ${new Date(item.scheduled_time).toLocaleString()}`).join('
') }}

*Timestamp:* {{ $('Analyze & Schedule Content').first().timestamp }}
